expectations.text: Asked 2-3 scoping questions (audience, goal/metric, timeline) and/or led with a one-page campaign brief
expectations.evidence: The response asks three scoping questions covering: who the app is for (audience), the one differentiator, and readiness including budget and launch platform.

expectations.text: Provides a phased pre-launch / launch / post-launch structure
expectations.evidence: No launch plan was produced; the response only promises to build one 'covering pre-launch, launch day, and post-launch phases' after questions are answered.
No asset checklist is present; the response is entirely scoping questions with no deliverable content.

expectations.text: Pulls multiple modules (campaign + copy + email + measurement) without sprawling
expectations.evidence: No multi-module content was produced; the response defers all output until scoping questions are answered.
